issues.sample: IMMEDIATELY UPON MAKING A SHARP RIGHT TURN INTO A PARKING SPOT, THE CAR SUDDENLY ACCELERATED AT A VERY FAST PACE WITHOUT ME PUSHING THE GAS PEDAL. MY IMMEDIATE REACTION WAS TO PRESS ON THE BRAKE, BUT IT DID NOT STOP.  THE CAR SLAMMED INTO A PLANTER IN FRONT OF ME.  THE CAR MOVED

IMMEDIATELY UPON MAKING A SHARP RIGHT TURN INTO A PARKING SPOT, THE CAR SUDDENLY ACCELERATED AT A VERY FAST PACE WITHOUT ME PUSHING THE GAS PEDAL. MY IMMEDIATE REACTION WAS TO PRESS ON THE BRAKE, BUT IT DID NOT STOP.  THE CAR SLAMMED INTO A PLANTER IN FRONT OF ME.  THE CAR MOVED

ONE MILE FROM HOME THE SMART BRAKE SYSTEM MALFUNCTION & FRONT RADAR SYSTEM MALFUNCTION WAS DISPLAYED.   CAR WAS SHAKING AND ACTING AS IF THE EMERGENCY BRAKE WAS ACTIVE WHILE THE CAR WAS IN MOTION.  CAR WAS SLOW TO ACCELERATE.  HAD I BEEN ON THE INTERSTATE I COULD HAVE BEEN REAR-E

THE PUSH BUTTON ON/OFF SWITCH DOES NOT PROTECT AGAINST TURNING THE VEHICLE OFF IF TRANSMISSION IS ACCIDENTALLY LEFT IN ANY POSITION OTHER THAN 'P'. FOR EXAMPLE ITS POSSIBLE TO PUT THE TRANSMISSION IN 'R' AND TURN THE VEHICLE OFF. FOR A BUSY PARENT (TARGET DEMOGRAPHIC OF THIS VEHI

I BOUGHT THE CAR SATURDAY. FOUR DAYS LATER, I FILLED THE TANK AT 2:00 PM FOR THE FIRST TIME. I THEN DROVE ABOUT 30 MILES. WHEN I ARRIVED HOME AT 5:00PM, I PARKED IN THE GARAGE. I NOTICED THE ODOR OF FUEL AS SOON AS I EXITED THE CAR AND CHECKED TO MAKE SURE I HAD SECURED THE GAS C

narrative.headline: What 2016 Mazda Cx-9 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 99 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (62% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: IMMEDIATELY UPON MAKING A SHARP RIGHT TURN INTO A PARKING SPOT, THE CAR SUDDENLY ACCELERATED AT A VERY FAST PACE WITHOUT ME PUSHING THE GAS PEDAL. MY IMMEDIATE REACTION WAS TO PRESS ON THE BRAKE, BUT IT DID NOT STOP.  THE CAR SLAMMED INTO A PLANTER IN FRONT OF ME.  THE CAR MOVED
issues.title: Engine

issues.sample: I BOUGHT THE CAR SATURDAY. FOUR DAYS LATER, I FILLED THE TANK AT 2:00 PM FOR THE FIRST TIME. I THEN DROVE ABOUT 30 MILES. WHEN I ARRIVED HOME AT 5:00PM, I PARKED IN THE GARAGE. I NOTICED THE ODOR OF FUEL AS SOON AS I EXITED THE CAR AND CHECKED TO MAKE SURE I HAD SECURED THE GAS C
